steps.title: Include definition and example
steps.content: The student wants to define "Lazarus species" and give an example. The notes define the term as a living species once believed extinct, and they identify the black-footed ferret as such a species.

steps.title: Reject partial responses
steps.content: B describes the general idea but does not define the term or name the example. C gives only a detail about the ferret. D gives an example but does not define the term clearly. The answer is A.
